scripts.build: npm run build:mcp-codex && npm run build:server && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.dev: npm run build:mcp-codex && concurrently -k -n API,UI "tsx packages/server/src/index.ts" "vite --config apps/dashboard/vite.config.ts --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n API,UI "node packages/server/dist/index.js" "npm run preview"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/mcp-codex/tsconfig.json --pretty && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --pretty && tsc -p apps/dashboard/tsconfig.json --pretty
